ddls:
CREATE TABLE "land_cover_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the land cover type */,
  "presence" TEXT /* Presence or absence of the land cover type */,
  "clDD" REAL /* Cumulative degree days above a threshold */,
  "clFD" REAL /* Cumulative frost days */,
  "clTmi" REAL /* Minimum temperature */,
  "clTma" REAL /* Maximum temperature */,
  "clTmn" REAL /* Mean temperature */,
  "clP" REAL /* Precipitation */,
  "NDVI" REAL /* Normalized Difference Vegetation Index */,
  "broadleaf" REAL /* Proportion of broadleaf land cover */,
  "conif" REAL /* Proportion of conifer land cover */,
  "grass" REAL /* Proportion of grass land cover */,
  "crop" REAL /* Proportion of crop land cover */,
  "urban" REAL /* Proportion of urban land cover */,
  "wetland" REAL /* Proportion of wetland land cover */,
  "data_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was collected */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_cover_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_land_cover_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "locality" TEXT /* More specific locality information (e.g., city, town) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., satellite, ground-based sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL to access the data source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate variable */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the climate variable */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the climate variable */,
  "measurement_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of measurement (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the climate variable data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "land_cover_types" (
  "cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each land cover type */,
  "cover_name" TEXT /* Name of the land cover type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the land cover type */,
  "cover_code" TEXT /* A standardized code for the land cover type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the land cover type data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_entries" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the land cover data entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used */,
  "date_collected" TEXT /* Date when the data was collected */,
  "collected_by" TEXT /* Name of the person or entity who collected the data */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data entry */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_entries_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES land_cover_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, organization) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data entry */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data entry was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON, ZIP) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file for data integrity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the metadata belongs to */,
  "key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata field */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata field */,
  "metadata_type" TEXT /* Type of metadata (e.g., system, user) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_size" REAL /* Size of the report in MB */,
  "report_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the report for data integrity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_entry_id FOREIGN KEY ("entry_id") REFERENCES data_entries ("entry_id")
)
